videos.video_subject: As a young player at Sporting Lisbon Cristiano Ronaldo's teammates gave him the cruel nickname crybaby because he would cry with frustration whenever they refused to pass him the ball, a sign of how badly he wanted to win
videos.video_script: As a kid, Ronaldo's teammates gave him a cruel nickname: crybaby. He cried every time they refused to pass him the ball. Turns out he was just a winner. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Cristiano Ronaldo close up face, Cristiano Ronaldo Portugal, Cristiano Ronaldo young Sporting Lisbon, Cristiano Ronaldo serious face, Cristiano Ronaldo emotional, Cristiano Ronaldo celebration
